reference_policy: reference[0] is retained only as a difficulty signal; seizure_frequency_number[0] is the gold label
scorer_semantics: No scorer semantics changed. Arm summaries report gan2026_paper_reproduction for paper-facing comparison and gan_frequency_deterministic_v1 as a diagnostic clinical/project view.

ablation_plan.selector: LLM reads the note and emits the final Gan label directly
LLM selects one candidate or explicit fallback policy
ablation_plan.label_constructor: deterministic constructor emits selected candidate label

ablation_plan.selector: LLM selects reason code/family and candidate target
ablation_plan.label_constructor: deterministic constructor emits label from selected target
normalization plus audited Gan taxonomy validation only

candidate_records.evidence_text: Over the past six weeks he has noticed that brief episodes are tending to bunch together after he wakes, occurring on several mornings each week despite taking his tablets as prescribed. He describes these as short spells of disorientation with a metallic taste and a need to pause for 30–60 seconds, without loss of awareness, sometimes repeating two or three times within the same morning.
candidate_records.derivation: several mornings each week with intra-morning repeats; per-cluster range preserved without inventing cluster spacing

candidate_records.evidence_text:
9045172368  
Flat 3B, 27 Millbank Court, London SW1P 4QP 

Diagnoses: 

Recurrent unprovoked seizures (first presentation 2023) 
Neuroimaging previously unremarkable (MRI brain 2023) 
Ambulatory EEG (June 2024) without clear epileptiform correlate 

Current Medication: 

Levetiracetam 750 mg twice daily 
Thiamine 100 mg once daily (patient-initiated, over-the-counter) 

Plan: 

Continue Levetiracetam 750 mg twice daily; maintain adherence and avoid abrupt cessation 
Safety counselling reinforced regarding bathing, heights, and machinery 
Driving advice per DVLA Group 1 standards; patient currently not driving and understands need to notify DVLA if applicable 
Seizure diary to be maintained; consider reduction of ASM only after a minimum of two seizure-free years with shared decision-making 
Arrange repeat renal profile and mood screening in three months 

I reviewed Amelia Johnson in my clinic today
candidate_records.derivation: explicit multi-year seizure freedom; emit policy canonical 'seizure free for multiple year' without inferring N
